---
name: Dev task (Definition of Done)
about: A specced task ready to hand off. If you cannot fill a field, it is not ready.
title: "<action-shaped one-liner>"
labels: []
---

<!--
Standard: brain/rules/definition-of-done.md. A field you cannot fill = the task is not ready to
hand off yet. Assign yourself so the weekly report can attribute this task by assignee.
-->

**Owner / assignee:** @you  (self-assign this issue and its PR; you drive it to done)

## Why
<the revenue or user reason, one sentence>

## In scope
-

## Out of scope
-

## Acceptance criteria
<!-- observable behavior, verifiable by clicking - not implementation -->
- [ ]
- [ ]

## References
- Intent: <App Store copy / Lark thread / spec>
- Standard: <Polaris component / Built-for-Shopify rule / repo convention>
- A prior PR we were happy with: <url>

## Size
<1-2 days; if bigger, split before assigning>

---
**Done means:** builds clean, no console errors, matches the linked standard, every acceptance
criterion checked, PR explains what + why, self-reviewed, screen capture attached.
